title: pilosella × viridifolia subsp. stenolepia
intro: Pilosella × viridifolia subsp. stenolepia is a subspecies of the Pilosella viridifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which are believed to be responsible for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Pilosella × viridifolia subsp. stenolepia can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular natural remedy in some cultures.
